title: Commodities struggle amid risk-off tone across markets
section_path: Commodities struggle amid risk-off tone across markets
section_path_text: Commodities struggle amid risk-off tone across markets
summary:
Main
A risk-off tone across wider markets weighed on sentiment in energy and metal sectors. By Daniel Hynes
Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2025-01-28 120015.png | assets/2025-01-28_commodities-struggle-amid-risk-off-tone-across-markets_img_cea3cf84ceb9ceb3cebcceb9cf8ccf84cf85_ef452b7e184c.png

Market Commentary
Base metals slumped amid a broader risk off tone across markets triggered by a selloff centred on the technology sector. This wasn't helped by economic data from China that fuelled concerns of overgrowth.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: Iraq has struggled to bring down exports of crude oil to levels stipulated under the OPEC+ agreement. They latest incident at the Rumaila field may just be the fillip.
